data.title: 国际服Hieronymus更新特殊补给

data.body:
[Hieronymus Update Rewards]

Sensei, now you can challenge all the Total Assault bosses in INSANE, even including Hieronymus! We're giving away special gifts so that you can be fully prepared for the battle.
Be sure to check your Mailbox every 3:00 AM (UTC)!🎁

#BlueArchive![Zau7tGzeoiu6SaGSbnLj4yNY5UmoIdcc.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/Zau7tGzeoiu6SaGSbnLj4yNY5UmoIdcc.jpg)
